testcase.name: test_existing_url_and_data_uri_tokens_are_not_rewritten

failure.message: AssertionError: {'errors': 1, 'rows': [{'data': {'category': 'Ethnic Fashion', 'colors': [], 'description': 'A product with three image tokens of different types.', 'images': ['https://res.cloudinary.com/dfk7mtpk9/image/upload/v1781220156/allsale/products/user_4eb5fc190cce/0450c5b577bd.png', 'https://cdn.example.com/keep.jpg', 'data:image/png', 'base64', 'iVBORw0KGgo='], ...}, 'errors': ["image_url 'base64…' is not a valid URL"], 'mode': 'create', 'ok': False, ...}], 'total': 1, 'valid': 0, ...} assert 0 == 1

testcase.failure: tests/test_bulk_zip_images_edges.py:289: in test_existing_url_and_data_uri_tokens_are_not_rewritten assert body["valid"] == 1, body E AssertionError: {'errors': 1, 'rows': [{'data': {'category': 'Ethnic Fashion', 'colors': [], 'description': 'A product with three image tokens of different types.', 'images': ['https://res.cloudinary.com/dfk7mtpk9/image/upload/v1781220156/allsale/products/user_4eb5fc190cce/0450c5b577bd.png', 'https://cdn.example.com/keep.jpg', 'data:image/png', 'base64', 'iVBORw0KGgo='], ...}, 'errors': ["image_url 'base64…' is not a valid URL"], 'mode': 'create', 'ok': False, ...}], 'total': 1, 'valid': 0, ...} E assert 0 == 1
